questions.explanation: awareness có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ hai, các từ còn lại rơi vào âm tiết thứ nhất.

questions.explanation: obey có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ hai, các từ còn lại rơi vào âm tiết thứ nhất.

questions.explanation: habitat có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ nhất, các từ còn lại rơi vào âm tiết thứ hai.

questions.explanation: degree có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ hai, các từ còn lại rơi vào âm tiết thứ nhất.

questions.text: Choose the word which has a different stress pattern from that of the others.
questions.explanation: apprenticeship có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ hai, các từ còn lại rơi vào âm tiết thứ ba.

questions.text: Choose the word which has a different stress pattern from that of the others.

questions.text: __________ helps protect and restore heritage by raising money for cultural projects.
questions.explanation: Crowdfunding (huy động vốn cộng đồng) phù hợp với ngữ cảnh gây quỹ cho các dự án văn hóa.

questions.text: In an effort to __________ cultural diversity, the festival featured performances...
questions.explanation: preserve (bảo tồn) phù hợp với ngữ cảnh bảo vệ sự đa dạng văn hóa.

questions.text: Is becoming independent as __________ as we may think?
questions.explanation: challenging (đầy thách thức) phù hợp với câu hỏi về sự độc lập.

questions.text: Exploring ancient temples and pagodas has become a __________ activity...
questions.explanation: trending (thịnh hành) phù hợp với ngữ cảnh hoạt động được ưa chuộng.

questions.text: They do part-time jobs to gain work experience and learn how to __________ money.
questions.explanation: manage money (quản lý tiền) là cụm từ phù hợp.

questions.text: This __________ app helps me create to-do lists...
questions.explanation: time-management app (ứng dụng quản lý thời gian) phù hợp với việc tạo danh sách việc cần làm.

questions.text: I have __________ of trying to complete all the housework...
questions.explanation: get into the habit of (có thói quen) là cụm từ đúng.

questions.text: Many students decide to __________ a gap year...
questions.explanation: take a gap year (nghỉ một năm) là cụm từ cố định.

questions.text: The site will be closed for six months __________ the buildings...
questions.explanation: to restore (để khôi phục) - động từ nguyên thể chỉ mục đích.

questions.text: __________ bullying includes using offensive language...
questions.explanation: Verbal bullying (bắt nạt bằng lời nói) liên quan đến việc dùng ngôn ngữ xúc phạm.

questions.text: Improving your self-__________ is one way to deal with body shaming.
questions.explanation: self-confidence (sự tự tin) là danh từ phù hợp.

questions.text: Vocational schools help students __________ practical skills...
questions.explanation: gain skills (đạt được kỹ năng) là cụm từ phổ biến.

questions.text: __________ is a growing concern as technology becomes more common...
questions.explanation: Cyberbullying (bắt nạt trực tuyến) là vấn đề phát triển cùng công nghệ.

questions.text: My mother remembered __________ visited this place.
questions.explanation: remember having done sth (nhớ đã làm gì) - danh động từ hoàn thành.

questions.text: If you don't want to go to university, you can __________ an apprenticeship...
questions.explanation: do an apprenticeship (học nghề) là cụm từ cố định.

questions.text: Thank you for __________ me your wonderful advice.
questions.explanation: thank you for having given (cảm ơn vì đã cho) - danh động từ hoàn thành.

questions.text: My parents were proud of having __________ the best schools...
questions.explanation: having + past participle (having chosen) - dạng hoàn thành của động từ.

questions.text: It is important for school-leavers to __________ a decision...
questions.explanation: make a decision (đưa ra quyết định) là cụm từ cố định.

questions.text: Many teenagers suffer __________ depression and anxiety...
questions.explanation: suffer from (chịu đựng, mắc phải) là cụm động từ đúng.

questions.text: __________ studied the brochure carefully, my brother decided...
questions.explanation: Having + past participle (Having studied) - phân từ hoàn thành chỉ hành động xảy ra trước.

questions.text: Having made the wrong decision, he __________ interest in studying the subject.
questions.explanation: Động từ chính ở thì quá khứ đơn (lost).

questions.text: The government is trying to protect young people __________ the negative effects of drug addiction.
questions.explanation: protect...from (bảo vệ khỏi) là cấu trúc đúng.

questions.text: We should focus __________ finding effective solutions to reduce poverty in our community.
questions.explanation: focus on (tập trung vào) là cụm động từ đúng.

questions.text: Alcohol and drug abuse can lead __________ serious health problems and social issues.
questions.explanation: lead to (dẫn đến) là cụm động từ đúng.

questions.text: Son Doong Cave is the largest cave __________ in Phong Nha-Ke Bang National Park.
questions.explanation: to be discovered (được phát hiện) - dạng bị động với động từ nguyên thể.

questions.text: The first thing __________ when you enter the city is the big, wooden church.
questions.explanation: the first thing to notice (điều đầu tiên để nhận thấy) - động từ nguyên thể sau cụm từ thứ tự.

questions.text: The travel agency offers a lot of destinations for tourists __________ from.
questions.explanation: to choose from (để lựa chọn) - động từ nguyên thể chỉ mục đích.

questions.text: Peer pressure can have a strong influence __________ the way young people behave at school.
questions.explanation: influence on (ảnh hưởng lên) là giới từ đúng.

questions.text: A(n) __________ is a community of living organisms interacting with the non-living parts of their environment.
questions.explanation: ecosystem (hệ sinh thái) là định nghĩa về cộng đồng sinh vật tương tác với môi trường.

questions.text: Soil, water, and sunlight are examples of __________ parts that support life in any habitat.
questions.explanation: non-living parts (các bộ phận không sống) như đất, nước, ánh sáng mặt trời.

questions.text: Wind and solar energy are types of __________ that we should use to protect the environment.
questions.explanation: natural resources (tài nguyên thiên nhiên) bao gồm năng lượng gió và mặt trời.

questions.text: The plan aims to preserve the __________ of the coral reef, which is home to thousands of marine species.
questions.explanation: biodiversity (đa dạng sinh học) của rạn san hô với hàng ngàn loài sinh vật biển.

questions.text: __________ are very important because they protect coastal areas from erosion and storm surges.
questions.explanation: Mangrove forests (rừng ngập mặn) bảo vệ vùng ven biển khỏi xói mòn và bão.

questions.text: High rainfall and warm temperatures are typical characteristics of a __________, which supports a wide range of plants.
questions.explanation: tropical forest (rừng nhiệt đới) có lượng mưa cao và nhiệt độ ấm.

questions.text: The first city __________ the Summer Olympics twice was Paris, France.
questions.explanation: the first city to host (thành phố đầu tiên đăng cai) - động từ nguyên thể sau cụm từ thứ tự.

questions.text: Located on a bridge over the Thu Bon River, Cau Pagoda is one of the most interesting places __________ in Hoi An.
questions.explanation: places to visit (những địa điểm để tham quan) - động từ nguyên thể.

questions.text: We need to raise people's awareness __________ the importance of body shaming and its consequences.
questions.explanation: awareness of (nhận thức về) là giới từ đúng.

questions.text: __________ her fears, she gave an excellent speech.
questions.explanation: Having overcome (đã vượt qua) - phân từ hoàn thành chỉ hành động xảy ra trước.

questions.text: Find the underlined part that needs correction: Body-shame is the practice of using offensive language about a person's appearance.
questions.explanation: Body-shame cần sửa thành Body-shaming (danh từ chỉ hành vi).

questions.text: Find the underlined part that needs correction: Not have spent enough time on studying, he didn't pass the exam.
questions.explanation: have cần sửa thành having (Having spent - phân từ hoàn thành).

questions.text: Find the underlined part that needs correction: My brother participated in the competition to testing his ideas about promoting heritage.
questions.explanation: to testing cần sửa thành to test (động từ nguyên thể chỉ mục đích).

questions.text: Find the underlined part that needs correction: Ha Long Bay is the only heritage site in Viet Nam to recognize twice by UNESCO.
questions.explanation: to recognize cần sửa thành to be recognized (dạng bị động).

questions.text: Find the underlined part that needs correction: In addition to enjoy our national parks, we should learn to protect them for future.
questions.explanation: enjoy cần sửa thành enjoying (sau In addition to + V-ing).

questions.text: Find the underlined part that needs correction: I need to revise for my English exam. In addition that, I'm working on my social awareness.
questions.explanation: that cần sửa thành to (In addition to - thêm vào đó).

questions.text: Find the underlined part that needs correction: Because poor wildlife management, many rare species in the national park may not survive.
questions.explanation: Because cần sửa thành Because of (vì sau đó là danh từ/cụm danh từ).

questions.text: Find the underlined part that needs correction: Although conservation efforts, many endangered species remain at risk.
questions.explanation: Although cần sửa thành Despite/In spite of (vì sau đó là danh từ).

questions.text:
Arrange the conversation:
a. Lucy: That's great! What inspired you to pursue this career?
b. Tom: I've always dreamed of working as a software engineer.
c. Tom: I've always been fascinated by technology and solving problems.
questions.explanation: fgdgfd.

questions.text:
Arrange the conversation:
a. An: I'm thinking of going hiking if the weather is nice!
b. Jane: I totally get that. Got any fun plans for the weekend?
c. An: Hey, how's your day going?
d. An: Same here, just trying to get everything done before the weekend.
e. Jane: Not bad, just a bit busy. How about yours?
questions.explanation: Thứ tự hợp lý: c (An chào hỏi) - e (Jane đáp) - d (An nói về mình) - b (Jane hỏi kế hoạch) - a (An trả lời).

questions.text:
Arrange the conversation:
a. Peter: Excuse me. Can you show me the way to the nearest bank?
b. Peter: Thank you so much!
c. Local: Sure! Go straight ahead, then turn left at the second intersection. The bank is on your right.
questions.explanation: Thứ tự: a (Peter hỏi đường) - c (Người địa phương chỉ đường) - b (Peter cảm ơn).

questions.text:
Arrange the conversation:
a. Grace: Well, I really appreciate that you can still hang out with me.
b. Alex: I'm so busy this week that I barely have time to eat.
c. Grace: Did you just get home? You go outside too often these days.
d. Grace: You're thinking of quitting? Great!
e. Alex: No problem. Oh, do you know anyone that has a new job opening?
questions.explanation: Thứ tự: c (Grace hỏi) - b (Alex trả lời bận rộn) - a (Grace nói lời cảm kích) - e (Alex đáp và hỏi việc làm) - d (Grace phản hồi).

questions.text:
Arrange the letter:
Hi James,
a. But I'm a bit worried about the time commitment.
b. Thanks for inviting me to join your study group!
c. I really like the idea because it helps me stay motivated.
d. Are the meetings flexible, or do we have fixed schedules?
e. If it works for my schedule, I'd love to join!
Write back soon.
Anna
questions.explanation: Thứ tự: b (cảm ơn lời mời) - c (thích ý tưởng) - a (lo lắng về thời gian) - d (hỏi về lịch linh hoạt) - e (khẳng định sẽ tham gia).

questions.text:
Arrange the letter:
Dear Sarah,
a. Thank you so much for the dress. It is exactly what I want for Christmas!
b. How are you? I already received the Christmas gift from you.
c. When we meet next time, I will have a special gift for you too!
d. Its colour and design suit me perfectly. I feel very happy and confident in it.
e. Hope to see you soon!
Take care,
Emily
questions.explanation: Thứ tự: b (hỏi thăm và nói đã nhận quà) - a (cảm ơn món quà) - d (khen màu sắc và kiểu dáng) - c (hứa tặng quà lại) - e (lời chào kết).

questions.text:
Arrange the paragraph:
a. These skills include communication, teamwork, time management, and problem-solving.
b. In today's workplace, soft skills are just as important as technical skills.
c. Employers highly value candidates who possess strong soft skills, as they contribute to a positive and productive work environment.
d. Without these abilities, even the most skilled employees may struggle to collaborate effectively.
e. Therefore, developing soft skills should be a priority for anyone preparing to enter the workforce.
questions.explanation: Thứ tự: b (câu chủ đề về soft skills) - a (liệt kê các kỹ năng) - c (nhà tuyển dụng đánh giá cao) - d (hậu quả nếu thiếu) - e (kết luận).

questions.text:
Arrange the letter:
Dear Sir or Madam,
a. I am very adaptable, reliable and excellent at multitasking.
b. I would be grateful if you consider me for the IT position.
c. I believe that I am perfectly suited for this role. Last year, I gained valuable experience working part-time at a local computer repair center.
d. I can work independently or as part of a team as I have experience working in a collaborative environment.
e. I am writing to apply for the IT support technician position advertised in the local newspaper on Tuesday 5th July.
I look forward to hearing from you soon.
Billy.
questions.explanation: Thứ tự: e (giới thiệu lý do viết thư) - c (tin rằng phù hợp và kinh nghiệm) - a (kỹ năng cá nhân) - d (kỹ năng làm việc nhóm) - b (yêu cầu xem xét).

questions.text:
Read the passage and choose the best answer:

It is not surprising that almost all first-year students have a lot of problems when they must live (1) __________ at university. At the first stage, due to not having a suitable schedule, they keep failing to meet deadlines. (2) __________ high school where the homework is quite simple and just about what is taught in class, the college or university assignments require the students to do more research for its requirements and to complete within a given time. Another issue which often makes students stressed is that they don't have (3) __________ money to pay for things. One reason for that problem is that some students don't (4) __________ enough financial support from their parents to pay for both tuition fee and living costs. Another reason is that some students don't spend money in the right way. It's possible for college or university students to thoroughly solve the problems above. For example, they can plan carefully for their assignments or essays, make use (5) __________ modern technologies to study faster. Besides, they can work part-time to support themselves financially.

Question (1):
questions.explanation: live independently (sống độc lập) - trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho động từ live.

questions.text:

At the first stage, due to not having a suitable schedule, they keep failing to meet deadlines. (2) Unlike high school where the homework is quite simple and just about what is taught in class, the college or university assignments require the students to do more research for its requirements and to complete within a given time. For example, they can plan carefully for their assignments or essays, make use (5) of modern technologies to study faster. Besides, they can work part-time to support themselves financially.

questions.text:
Read the passage and choose the best answer:

Time management for students is a universal issue. It's essential to know (1) __________ to manage your time for classes, assignments, friends and work if you have a part-time job. This is probably the most important skill that will help a student succeed. Unlike high school, where you have clearly defined class periods and a strict structure to your school day, college education (2) __________ their students to have more freedom. Unless you learn to manage your time, you may be constantly chased by (3) __________ and be left with little time to accomplish them all. Luckily, there are some strategies and tips that will help keep your assignments on track. Firstly, you need to set goals. Consider what you need to do this week, month and semester. Secondly, create a list of every task you need to complete in a certain time. Then figure (4) __________ which assignments you need to complete first and what tasks can wait. You can use sticky notes in bright colors to help remember what (5) __________. You can also use apps on your smartphone to set reminders. Once the deadline is reached, your phone will alert you with audio or visual cues.

Question (1):
questions.explanation: how to manage (cách quản lý) - phù hợp với ngữ cảnh.

questions.text:
Read the passage and choose the best answer:

Time management for students is a universal issue. It's essential to know (1) how to manage your time for classes, assignments, friends and work if you have a part-time job. This is probably the most important skill that will help a student succeed. Unlike high school, where you have clearly defined class periods and a strict structure to your school day, college education (2) __________ their students to have more freedom. Unless you learn to manage your time, you may be constantly chased by (3) deadlines and be left with little time to accomplish them all. Luckily, there are some strategies and tips that will help keep your assignments on track. Firstly, you need to set goals. Consider what you need to do this week, month and semester. Secondly, create a list of every task you need to complete in a certain time. Then figure (4) out which assignments you need to complete first and what tasks can wait. You can use sticky notes in bright colors to help remember what (5) to do. You can also use apps on your smartphone to set reminders. Once the deadline is reached, your phone will alert you with audio or visual cues.

questions.explanation: allows somebody to do something (cho phép ai làm gì).

questions.text:
Read the passage and choose the best answer:

Time management for students is a universal issue. It's essential to know (1) how to manage your time for classes, assignments, friends and work if you have a part-time job. This is probably the most important skill that will help a student succeed. Unlike high school, where you have clearly defined class periods and a strict structure to your school day, college education (2) allows their students to have more freedom. Unless you learn to manage your time, you may be constantly chased by (3) deadlines and be left with little time to accomplish them all. Luckily, there are some strategies and tips that will help keep your assignments on track. Firstly, you need to set goals. Consider what you need to do this week, month and semester. Secondly, create a list of every task you need to complete in a certain time. Then figure (4) out which assignments you need to complete first and what tasks can wait. You can use sticky notes in bright colors to help remember what (5) __________. You can also use apps on your smartphone to set reminders. Once the deadline is reached, your phone will alert you with audio or visual cues.

Question (5):
questions.explanation: what to do (việc cần làm) - cấu trúc từ để hỏi + to V.

questions.text:
Read the passage and choose the best answer:

My Son Sanctuary was discovered in 1885 and recognized by UNESCO as World Heritage Site in December 1999. It was built during the Chăm civilization between the 4th century and 13th century. It is a stunning architectural complex of more than 70 tower structures that are believed to be temples and tombs to worship Hindu Gods. It (1) __________ the values of history, culture, architecture and art in a long period of nine centuries. Each temple has a unique structural style that reflects the (2) __________ stages of the Chăm kingdom. Unfortunately, a large part of the architecture was destroyed (3) __________ natural disasters and war-related damage. About 10 of those temple towers are in almost perfect condition. However, it is still a destination that attracts tourists from all over the world. A management board has been set up to carry out restoration and conservation of the sanctuary. They not only (4) __________ the cultural heritage values but also develop tourism, improve local (5) __________ and promote unique Vietnamese cultural identities to the world.

questions.text:
Read the passage and choose the best answer:

Preserving heritage is a collective responsibility that requires conscious efforts and strategic approaches. Firstly, documentation plays a crucial role (1) __________ safeguarding heritage. It involves thorough research, and documentation of historical records, artifacts, and oral traditions (2) __________ with a particular heritage. This helps create an extensive archive that serves as a reference for future generations and aids in understanding and appreciating the significance of heritage.

Secondly, active conservation measures must be implemented to protect physical heritage. This includes regular restoration, and preventive measures to prevent deterioration and damage. Collaboration between heritage experts, conservation professionals, and local communities is essential to ensure the proper implementation of conservation techniques while respecting the integrity and authenticity of the heritage. (3) __________, promoting public awareness and engagement through educational programs, guided tours, and cultural events can (4) __________ a sense of pride and ownership among the community, encouraging their active participation in heritage preservation.

(Adapted from National Geographic)

Question (1):
questions.explanation: play a role in (đóng vai trò trong) là cụm từ cố định.

questions.text:

It involves thorough research, and documentation of historical records, artifacts, and oral traditions (2) __________ with a particular heritage. This helps create an extensive archive that serves as a reference for future generations and aids in understanding and appreciating the significance of heritage.

Secondly, active conservation measures must be implemented to protect physical heritage. This includes regular restoration, and preventive measures to prevent deterioration and damage. Collaboration between heritage experts, conservation professionals, and local communities is essential to ensure the proper implementation of conservation techniques while respecting the integrity and authenticity of the heritage. (3) Moreover, promoting public awareness and engagement through educational programs, guided tours, and cultural events can (4) foster a sense of pride and ownership among the community, encouraging their active participation in heritage preservation.

(Adapted from National Geographic)

questions.text:
Read the passage and choose the best answer:

Like any other universities, the Open University can give you a degree. (1) __________, you don't have to stop working to study. It can also open up a whole variety of interest. If you have never studied before, you will enjoy the special, new pleasure of (2) __________ your knowledge. You will make friends of all kinds. You may also find (3) __________ your qualification provides new career opportunities. You don't actually go to the Open University for lectures, but study at home using television, radio and computer software. You can (4) __________ one class a month if you wish at an Open University centre. Of course, there are exams to take, as in (5) __________ university. If you would like to know more, all you have to do is complete the form below. It could be the start of a wonderful new period in your life.
